body: ## Purpose Adds cloud cover from RRTMGP to diagnostics. The SW cloud cover is used for the cloud cover diagnostics. The SW and LW cloud cover look identical. Also removes 3d radiative fluxes from default diagnostics - they are not commonly used. Cloud cover in aquaplanet (upper panel: SW, bottom panel: LW): ## To-do ## Content ---- - [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: add cloud cover from RRTMGP
